## Description

What does this PR do? Why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles: `npx tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.app.json`
- [ ] Tested in dark mode
- [ ] Tested in light mode
- [ ] No `console.log` left behind
- [ ] PR targets `develop` branch (not `main`)

## Screenshots

If UI changes, add before/after screenshots.
